products.name: Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds Pro
products.description: High-quality wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, IPX5 waterproof.
products.description_cn: 高品质无线耳机，主动降噪，30小时续航，IPX5防水。

faq.q: How long does the battery last?
faq.a: Up to 30 hours with the charging case, or 6 hours on a single charge.
Yes, IPX5 rated—resistant to sweat and light rain.
配合充电盒最长30小时，单次充电6小时。

products.name: Smart Fitness Watch X200
products.description: Fitness tracker with heart rate monitoring, SpO2, GPS tracking, and 14-day battery life.
products.description_cn: 健身追踪器，支持心率监测、血氧检测、GPS追踪，14天续航。

faq.q: Does it support iOS and Android?
faq.a: Yes, compatible with iOS 13+ and Android 8+.

faq.q: How to return a defective item?
faq.a: Contact customer service within 7 days of delivery. Free return shipping for defective items.

products.name: Portable Power Bank 20000mAh
products.description: 20000mAh high-capacity power bank with 65W fast charging, USB-C and USB-A ports.
products.description_cn: 20000mAh大容量充电宝，65W快充，USB-C和USB-A双口输出。

faq.a: Yes, 20000mAh is within the 100Wh airline limit. Must be carried in carry-on luggage.

faq.q: How many times can it charge an iPhone?

products.name: Silk Pillowcase Set (2 pcs)
products.description: 100% mulberry silk pillowcases, skin-friendly, hypoallergenic, includes 2 pillowcases.
products.description_cn: 100%桑蚕丝枕套，亲肤防过敏，含2个枕套。

faq.a: Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent, or machine wash on delicate cycle in a mesh bag.
Standard Queen size: 20 x 30 inches (51 x 76 cm).

products.name: LED Ring Light 12-inch
products.description: 12-inch ring light with tripod stand, 3 color modes, 10 brightness levels, USB powered, ideal for streaming and video calls.
products.description_cn: 12英寸环形补光灯含三脚架，3种色温模式，10档亮度调节，USB供电，适合直播和视频通话。

faq.q: Does it come with a tripod?
faq.a: Yes, includes an adjustable tripod stand (extends from 40cm to 180cm).

faq.q: Can I use it for Zoom calls?
faq.a: Absolutely! The warm light mode is ideal for video conferencing.

return_policy.conditions: Items must be unused and in original packaging. Buyer pays return shipping unless item is defective.
return_policy.refund_timeline: Refund processed within 5-7 business days after warehouse receives the return.
